description: Relative paths from this tool dir to CF7 game data it operates on. Consumed by core helpers and the CLI/GUI. No absolute paths in source.

saves.comment: saves/{slot}.json JSON shadows; real SOL lives under %APPDATA%/Macromedia/Flash Player/#SharedObjects

sol.comment: oracleParserExe is the Rust flash_lso reference reader used only to (re)generate golden JSON; not invoked at runtime.

authoring.comment: 60+ source FLA/XFL character/effect projects authored in Adobe Animate CS6
